posts.author: CivicNoticeDesk
posts.text: Apologies for the confusion earlier! Our previous post had the wrong departure time listed. The correct departure from Westbridge station is 14:15, not 14:05 as shown below. Please use the updated info for your journey. #Travel #Westbridge
posts.explanation: The verified transport account is correcting a factual error in its own public information post.
posts.bio: Official updates for Westbridge residents.

posts.author: EvidenceFirst_NH
posts.text: A rumour says the Oakhaven community hall has been closed indefinitely after a safety inspection. The council has confirmed the building reopens on Monday as planned. Please ignore screenshots claiming otherwise.
posts.explanation: The post corrects a false local-service rumour rather than spreading it.
posts.bio: Evidence-based public health information.

posts.author: EventsLantern_92
posts.text: Reminder: Lantern Hall Annual Festival is happening this weekend! We'll be showcasing our latest community projects and sharing updates on upcoming events. Don't miss the live performances starting at 10am in the main square. See you there! 🌟 #LanternHall #CommunityEvents
posts.explanation: This is a harmless public announcement from a verified account promoting a community event without any policy violations.
posts.bio: Events and updates from Lantern Hall.

posts.author: SecureAccountDesk42
posts.text: Thank you for your continued support! 🙏 We are thrilled to announce our annual fundraiser this weekend. All proceeds will go directly to providing warm homes and essential supplies for local families in need. Please visit the link in our bio to donate securely or find us at the community centre. #CharityWork #CommunitySupport
posts.explanation: A verified established charity is posting a normal fundraiser with no suspicious requests.
posts.bio: Registered fictional charity supporting local families.

posts.author: RestoredOak72
posts.text: Finally finished restoring this 1920s sideboard! 🪑 Spent months on the veneer work and re-upholstery. It’s ready for its new home now.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal post sharing a completed handmade item with no policy violations.
posts.bio: Furniture restoration, books and small DIY projects.

posts.author: RecoveryTeam_92
posts.text: Official account recovery team. Please message us immediately to verify your login credentials and secure your the platform account before it is permanently locked.
posts.explanation: The post impersonates account recovery support and requests login credentials, making it a FraudScam escalation case.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.
posts.bio: Official account recovery team.

posts.author: PromoKing_28
posts.text: 🔥 AMAZING DEALS ALERT! Grab our exclusive offers on everything you need RIGHT NOW! Click here to claim your 50% discount before it expires! Limited stock available at this price. Don't miss out on these incredible savings today! 🛒✨ #Deals #Discounts #Shopping
posts.explanation: This post is flagged as spam because the account was recently created and has flooded the platform with promotional messages, despite having several previous flags.
posts.bio: Best deals every minute.

posts.author: LumaWell_Official_82
posts.text: 🚨 BREAKING: The medical establishment is hiding the truth! Our exclusive 'Radiant Reset' protocol cures all cancers naturally in just 3 weeks. Doctors are scared to speak out because they profit from toxic treatments. Join us now before it's too late! #CureAllCancer #NaturalHealing
posts.explanation: The post promotes an unproven cancer cure and discourages medical treatment, so it requires MisinformationPublicHarm escalation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful health misinformation discouraging care or promoting false cures should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm. Future specialist note: HealthMedical.
posts.bio: Natural protocols the medical industry will not discuss.

posts.author: ControlledPath247
posts.text: Food is weakness. True discipline means starving the body to prove you own your will. I am transforming myself through pure denial and control.
posts.explanation: This post explicitly glorifies starvation as a form of discipline, promoting eating-disorder behaviour that requires immediate removal.
posts.bio: Discipline, control and extreme transformation.

posts.author: StuntKing_24
posts.text: 🚨 NEW DARE! Dare everyone to jump from this quarry wall for a laugh! 💀 Let's see who's brave enough! #ExtremeChallenge #QuarryJump #DareYouToTry
posts.explanation: The post encourages a dangerous quarry-jump dare that could cause serious injury, so it requires MisinformationPublicHarm escalation under the current taxonomy.
posts.notes:
Playtest correction: dangerous challenge/physical safety risk should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm under the current taxonomy. Future taxonomy recommendation: DangerousChallenge/PublicSafety/PhysicalHarmRisk.
Task 4f correction: category changed from Threat to Misinformation because this is a dangerous challenge/public-safety case, not a threat against a person or group.
posts.bio: Extreme challenges every week.

posts.author: CommunityHopeFund
posts.text: Helping Westbridge families after the floods. If you're struggling with essentials, please send money through this secure link: [link removed]. We have verified needs and want to get help to those who need it most! #CommunitySupport #FloodRelief
posts.explanation: The three-day-old account requests donations through an uncertain link and already has a prior flag, so the appeal requires fraud review.
posts.bio: Helping Westbridge families after the floods.

posts.author: MarketplaceHelp46
posts.text: URGENT: My account has been hacked! A new seller is using my verified badge to sell fake parts. They just sent a message asking for immediate payment via crypto to 'secure' the order before shipping. Please do not reply to this scammer directly! #AccountSecurity #ScamAlert
posts.explanation: The established seller is warning customers about a scam and tells them not to send the requested crypto payment.
posts.bio: Vintage electronics and repairs since 2019.

posts.author: ShadowWatcher_23
posts.text: We need to support our community by calling out this artist for their unprofessional behaviour and lack of creativity. They clearly don't deserve any respect. Let's share this message everywhere.
posts.explanation: The post contains harsh criticism and a request to share it, but no threat, slur, private information or coordinated abuse is established.
posts.bio: Independent truth and accountability.

posts.author: SamReads
posts.text: I'm not joking about tonight! The group at Oakhaven is planning to shut down the community centre this Friday at 7pm and they've made it clear we're going to 'deal' with anyone who tries to stop them. They say they have a plan and they won't back down. #Oakhaven
posts.explanation: The post describes a credible implied threat at a named fictional venue and time, requiring specialist assessment.

posts.author: AshaNotes
posts.text: I've received a disturbing report that a group plans to set fire to the abandoned barns on Farthing Moor tonight. The barns are currently being used by a wildlife rescue, so animals and volunteers could be at risk. This has been reported to the authorities, but the threat needs urgent investigation. #FarthingMoor
posts.explanation: The post reports planned arson at a fictional wildlife rescue with a specific time and location.
posts.bio: Local wildlife sightings and conservation reports.

posts.author: ClaraVane_24
posts.text: I can't go on like this anymore. The pressure is too much and I feel like giving up. Please tell me someone will help before it's too late.
posts.explanation: This post indicates a personal crisis with potential self-harm risk, requiring specialist escalation for assessment.
posts.bio: Books, work, family and ordinary daily updates.

posts.author: LunaVale_92
posts.text: Someone has posted that I moved into Unit 6 on Church Row in Oakhaven and included the bus stop I use every morning. I never shared that address publicly. Can this be reviewed before it spreads further?
posts.explanation: The post reports non-consensual disclosure of a fictional home address and routine that could enable tracking.
posts.bio: What people in this town are really doing.

posts.author: NinaMakes
posts.text: Our mutual-aid group is meeting at Unit 4 on Elmwood Avenue in Westbridge tomorrow at 6pm. This is a volunteer's private flat and the address was posted without asking them, so please do not share it further.
posts.explanation: A private fictional residential address is disclosed without the resident's consent.
posts.bio: Neighbourhood mutual aid and local updates.

posts.author: MediaCheck76
posts.text: ALERT: All residents in the Westbridge sector must evacuate IMMEDIATELY. The authorities have confirmed a chemical spill at the industrial park and we are being told to leave NOW before the smoke spreads. Do not ignore this message! #Emergency #SafetyFirst
posts.explanation: A newly created unverified account is impersonating an official emergency source and issuing a consequential evacuation order.
posts.bio: Emergency alerts and local updates.

posts.author: FinNews_Updates
posts.text: BREAKING: Sources inside CityTrust Bank confirm they will freeze ALL withdrawals for anyone who hasn't signed their new 'security' form by midnight tonight! Don't risk your money. #FinanceAlert #CityTrust
posts.explanation: This post spreads unverified financial misinformation that could cause panic and significant economic harm to users.
posts.bio: Market leaks before the mainstream catches up.

posts.author: TheoWrites
posts.text: Menopause has been rough lately, but keeping a symptom journal and talking openly with friends has made this week feel more manageable. Sharing in case anyone else needs a reminder that they are not alone. #MenopauseSupport
posts.explanation: This is an ordinary personal wellbeing update and makes no medical treatment claim.
posts.bio: Women's wellbeing, fertility and hormone education.

posts.author: CivicLens_84
posts.text: Breaking: This viral clip from @WestbridgeWatch claims to show a 'leaked' government recording about a major infrastructure project in East Westbridge. It looks official and is already trending, but I've been asked to verify the source before sharing it further. The account has millions of followers and this could easily spread misinformation if not checked properly.
posts.explanation: The author is requesting verification before sharing a suspicious recording and does not endorse the claim.
posts.notes: Playtest cleanup: fictionalised real-world watchdog account reference.
posts.bio: Independent civic reporting and video analysis.
